CVE-2018-17828.title: Directory traversal vulnerability in ZZIPlib 0.13.69 allows attac ...
CVE-2018-17828.summary: Directory traversal vulnerability in ZZIPlib 0.13.69 allows attackers to overwrite arbitrary files via a .. (dot dot) in a zip file, because of the function unzzip_cat in the bins/unzzipcat-mem.c file.

CVE-2018-7727.title: An issue was discovered in ZZIPlib 0.13.68. There is a memory lea ...
CVE-2018-7727.summary: An issue was discovered in ZZIPlib 0.13.68. There is a memory leak triggered in the function zzip_mem_disk_new in memdisk.c, which will lead to a denial of service attack.

CVE-2020-18442.title: Infinite Loop in zziplib v0.13.69 allows remote attackers to caus ...
CVE-2020-18442.summary: Infinite Loop in zziplib v0.13.69 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via the return value "zzip_file_read" in the function "unzzip_cat_file".

CVE-2020-18770.summary: An issue was discovered in function zzip_disk_entry_to_file_header in mmapped.c in zziplib 0.13.69, which will lead to a denial-of-service.

CVE-2024-39133.title: Heap Buffer Overflow vulnerability in zziplib v0.13.77 allows att ...
CVE-2024-39133.summary: Heap Buffer Overflow vulnerability in zziplib v0.13.77 allows attackers to cause a denial of service via the __zzip_parse_root_directory() function at /zzip/zip.c.

CVE-2024-39134.summary: A Stack Buffer Overflow vulnerability in zziplibv 0.13.77 allows attackers to cause a denial of service via the __zzip_fetch_disk_trailer() function at /zzip/zip.c.
